title: Builds
excerpt: description: Use Workers Builds to integrate with Git and automatically build and deploy your Worker when pushing a change image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The Cloudflare [Git integration](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/ci-cd/builds/git-integration/) lets you connect a new or existing Worker to a GitHub or GitLab repository, enabling automated builds and deployments for your Worker on push.
